summary.zh: 3D 低多边形生成器工作台,基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点图编程应用。你用节点管线参数化地生成 low-poly 几何,经 OCCT / replicad 在后端烘焙网格,前端用 three.js / URDF 实时预览,最终导出 .glb。它把「建模」变成可复用、可批处理的节点图,AI 可经 pipeline 工具(applyBatch / execute / import / export)批量编排,也支持项目管理、内置零件库(batteries)与截图。
summary.en: The 3D Lowpoly Generator workbench — a node-graph programming app built on @forgeax/node-runtime. You build parametric low-poly geometry through a node pipeline, bake meshes with OCCT / replicad on the backend, preview live in three.js / URDF on the front end, and export .glb. It turns 'modeling' into a reusable, batchable node graph; AI can orchestrate via pipeline tools (applyBatch / execute / import / export), with project management, a built-in parts library (batteries) and screenshots.

body.zh:
节点管线参数化 → OCCT / replicad 烘焙 → 导出 .glb
three.js / URDF 实时预览
body.en:
Node pipeline → OCCT / replicad bake → export .glb
three.js / URDF live preview

body.zh:
pipeline 工具:applyBatch / execute / import / export
项目管理 + 零件库(batteries)+ 截图
body.en:
pipeline tools: applyBatch / execute / import / export
projects + batteries library + screenshots

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开面板或对话 /wb-3d-lowpoly
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the panel or /wb-3d-lowpoly

notes.zh: 首版:节点式 3D 低多边形生成器
